/usr/bin/c++ -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/tests/node/main1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/node/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/node/node_configuration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/p2p/IP_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/p2p/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/p2p/open_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/p2p/open_server_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Spyke.dir/p2p/socket.cpp.o -o Spyke
